name: gmmepylib

metadata.name: gmmepylib
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules

documentation:
# gmme-pylib
GMME Lib migrated to python

## Supported platforms:
> windows

> linux

## Tested python versions:
> 3.10+

modules.name: gmmePylib.BatchApp
documentation: Licensed under the GMM Software License
This package contains the BatchApp object.  This is a base application
object that takes care of common batch processing stuff.  The object
will initialize and setup the following stuff:
The class is used as follows:
The following statements declares a new application object and starts
processing.  The command line and all processing of .opt files will be
completed at this point.  Processing consist of the following member
functions being	called, in the following order (note: each of this
functions will be declared as call backs):

functions.name: gmmePylib.BatchApp.CreateBatchApp

functions.name: gmmePylib.Utils.CmdLine.Create
documentation: #	This routine will load command line options based on values in a hash that
#	contains a command line option and a control hash.
#	Each key entry in the hash consist of a hash set has following keys:
#		t =>	the type of function (GETDBLOGON, GETOPTVALUE, etc)
#   	v =>	reference to where value should be placed
#		vn =>	db name ref from GETDBLOGON
